summary: Comprehensive testing of AU4A (Ask Us 4 Anything) platform completed. Fixed 2 critical bugs: 1) User progress lookup now works with anonymous_id, 2) Black Box routing fixed to use /api prefix. All 35 backend API tests pass. Frontend UI tests confirm sequential quadrant reveal, hidden Black Box, non-clickable sponsor logos, and hybrid AI search working correctly.

issues: Good dark theme with proper contrast

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: User progress endpoint was looking up by 'id' only, but frontend passes 'anonymous_id'. Fixed to use $or query.
FIXED: Black Box router had prefix '/blackbox' which wasn't routed through Kubernetes ingress. Changed to '/api/blackbox'.
FIXED: blackbox.py was missing MongoDB connection - added db import.
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed user lookup to check both id and anonymous_id
/app/backend/blackbox.py - Added /api prefix to router and MongoDB connection
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix during pytest runs
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working. Sequential quadrant reveal enforces A→B→C→D progression. Black Box requires master key authentication. Sponsor logos are non-clickable. Hybrid AI search uses DuckDuckGo + Emergent LLM for unbiased results.

features_tested.sequential_quadrant_reveal: PASS - Only Ask visible for new users, locked placeholder for next layer
features_tested.black_box_hidden: PASS - Not in navigation, requires master key auth at /blackbox
features_tested.sponsor_logos_non_clickable: PASS - No external links on sponsor logos
features_tested.hybrid_ai_search: PASS - Returns web results with relevance scores, no ads
features_tested.ethics_evaluation: PASS - 4 sliders (legality, morality, harm, cultural impact)
features_tested.contribute_layer: PASS - 6 B-types available (borrow, barter, buy, bring, bestow, befriend)
features_tested.user_progress: PASS - Level tracking and feature unlocking working
features_tested.journey_page: PASS - Shows 5 layers of revelation with unlock requirements

deployment_readiness: YES - System is ready for deployment. All critical features working correctly.
